item.title: John Tucker Must Dump
item.dc:creator: derek237

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
awesome?
mmm hmm
always wanted one, only tried them once or twice
we've all been there..
as is tradition
i have questions
i guess
sounds dangerou
Hobo with a Shotgun?
wait what
subtle
is it possible to learn this power?
i must confess, i still believe
yes?
again
you're welcome
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1310 (lycanthropy boosters)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Hello void.
By Ironlily
Seriously, this was a thing the Romans did.
He did. Let us follow His example.
IT IS OKAY AND HONORABLE TO ASK FOR HELP.
I swear, Kestrels are the embodiment of the "the risk I took was calculated but man am I bad at math" meme.
Yeah, I can hear Orson Welles saying this in my head.
Peeent.
I'm bi-poly. I'm on Standbi, and p'oly will be for a long time. *rimshot*
Gallowglasses.
*Whorehammer. You had the perfect chance to use that as a pun and you FAILED. Exterminatus.
Pippin tax! EDIT: today's message from Pippin: "Reeep. Go Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Stale Memes, repackaged as FRESH MEMES Dump #791
item.description:
1. One more round, I swear
2. Cops vs Dude with gatling fireworks cannon
3. Me when someone offers me snacks
4. My review of 2025 so far
5. That's genius business model
6
7
8. She calls this move "The Washing Machine"
9. Nothing beats the power of a loving father
10. When mom is the disciplinarian and dad is the fun parent
11. Accident aside, if there was ever a time to do a Batista Bomb, that was it
12. Average Cat Owner Experience
14. If you get, you get it ;)
15. The average game dev experience! Funny thing my dudes, my game is finally ready to release I even have a release date set. If you are fan of questionable humor and poor life decisions, be sure to wishlist Do Not Press The Button (Or You'll Delete The Multiverse) on Steam! It really helps small indie dev teams, like me and my brother: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: What Happened Today #53
item.description: ? Authoritarian overreach is now casual. Trump’s team plotted a military strike in an unsecured chat, while Musk’s DOGE scraped private data on millions—and Social Security rushed service cuts that could block benefits for the sick and poor. Judges are under attack. Troops are expelled. Chaos is a feature, not a bug. Subscribe to get your headlines free in email: https://govbrief.today ? Read today’s post. Then raise hell. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyd9e5lkpro 2. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/24/columbia-student-ice-lawsuit-trump 3. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/24/trump-tariff-venezuela-oil-00244832 4. https://www.mediaite.com/news/the-new-york-times-fires-back-after-vicious-trump-attack-intimidation-tactics-wont-work/ 5. https://apnews.com/article/trump-judge-boasberg-venezuelan-immigrants-31217ce8ef990c9bd6ecb49654b6bf47 6. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/trump-s-social-media-attacks-on-judge-boasberg-spark-security-concerns/ar-AA1Bz3Ye 7. https://www.denverpost.com/2025/03/24/trump-portrait-colorado-capitol/ 8. https://www.yahoo.com/news/trump-names-alina-habba-nj-204950132.html 9. https://www.politico.com/live-updates/2025/03/24/congress/jordan-briefs-trump-on-plans-to-rein-in-federal-judges-00246748 10. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/supreme-court-trump-federal-workers-reinstatement/ 11. https://www.courthousenews.com/federal-judge-blocks-doge-representatives-from-accessing-sensitive-data-of-2-million-plaintiffs/ 12. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/24/second-judge-blocks-trumps-pentagon-transgender-ban/82637457007/?tbref=hp 13. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/24/social-security-cuts-doge 14. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/20/tesla-owners-are-trading-in-their-evs-at-record-levels-edmunds-says.html

item.title: Tight little phone dump
item.description: They removed the sexy meme. Apparently even the idea of two people having sex with nothing shown but their heads is way too much for this garbage platform. Censorship is out of control so I hope you all saved that one.

item.title: Operation Iraqi Freedom - 2009
item.description: I have it really bad this morning. To the point of almost throwing up. I am taking my cannabis now and it’s getting me to a point that I can write. When these attacks are really bad it feels like I’m about to die. Stomach, head, sweats, feels like I’m about to be hit. Thank you for reading. Writing helps pulls me out of panic attacks
item.dc:creator: comingfromdistrict12
